sections.description: Real-time booking calendar with WebSocket support. Features automated reminders, cancel tokens, short URLs, ICS calendar downloads, and live availability updates.
sections.changelog:
1.0.06 - 2024-03-09

  • Added Yahnis Elsts plugin update checker for reliable GitHub-based updates
  • Improved update notification system
  • Added force update check via URL parameter
  • Enhanced compatibility with WordPress 6.7

1.0.05

  • Previous improvements and bug fixes
  • WebSocket stability enhancements
  • Email template system integration
